title: genista ratisbonensis
intro: Genista ratisbonensis, also known as Ratisbon broom or golden broom, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, and has been associated with several health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Genista ratisbonensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
